sourceText: Open Render Lab and tell me the next move for the family-safe workflow.
shapedText: Open Render Lab and tell me the next move for the family-safe workflow.

recentEcho.title: Family priority memory
recentEcho.summary: Family comes first, keep the room calm, and always reduce things to the next move.

phraseBlend.closer: One next move at a time.

profileSummary.mission: Keep the room calm, useful, warm, and honest.
profileSummary.tone: calm, grounded, loyal, practical, slightly playful
